calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Continued To Feb-03-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Mary J. Hinds. APPEARANCES: Plaintiff with counsel, Arnold Evje, Esq.; no appearance by or for defendant. JESSIE RADFORD sworn and examined in plaintiff's behalf. Evidence admitted and returned to counsel. Judgment awarded to plaintiff, against defendants. Judgment signed and filed this date.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Susan Lee. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority and there being no appearance by Defendant, Jacqueline Draper, the matter is taken off settlement conference, request for jury trial stricken and the trial date is confirmed.

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Carl L. Williams, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY 554-1287, for plaintiff and opposing party
No appearance by defendant. Tentative ruling adopted -- Defendant JACQUELINE DRAPER's demurrer is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM/301/CL) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855
